2604.05468.title: OntoTKGE: Ontology-Enhanced Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation
2604.05468.paper_summary: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) extrapolation is an important task that aims to predict future facts through historical interaction information within KG snapshots. A key challenge for most existing TKG extrapolation models is handling entities with sparse historical interaction. The ontological knowledge is beneficial for alleviating this sparsity issue by enabling these entities to inherit behavioral patterns from other entities with the same concept, which is ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework OntoTKGE that leverages the ontological knowledge from the ontology-view KG (i.e., a KG modeling hierarchical relations among abstract concepts as well as the connections between concepts and entities) to guide the TKG extrapolation model's learning process through the effective integration of the ontological and temporal knowledge, thereby enhancing entity embeddings. OntoTKGE is flexible enough to adapt to many TKG extrapolation models. Extensive experiments on four data sets demonstrate that OntoTKGE not only significantly improves the performance of many TKG extrapolation models but also surpasses many SOTA baseline methods.
2604.05468.paper_summary_zh: 時間知識圖譜 (TKG) 外推是一項重要任務，旨在通過 KG 快照中的歷史互動信息預測未來事實。大多數現有 TKG 外推模型的一個主要挑戰是處理歷史互動稀疏的實體。本體知識有助於緩解這一稀疏問題，使這些實體能夠從具有相同概念的其他實體中繼承行為模式，而這一點在以往的研究中被忽視。在本文中，我們提出了一種新穎的編碼器-解碼器框架 OntoTKGE，利用來自本體視圖 KG 的本體知識（即，建模抽象概念之間的層次關係以及概念與實體之間的連接的 KG）來指導 TKG 外推模型的學習過程，通過有效整合本體知識和時間知識，從而增強實體嵌入。OntoTKGE 足夠靈活，可以適應許多 TKG 外推模型。在四個數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，OntoTKGE 不僅顯著提高了許多 TKG 外推模型的性能，還超越了許多 SOTA 基準方法。
2604.05468.author: Dongying Lin et.al.
2604.05468.authors: Dongying Lin, Yinan Liu, Shengwei tang, Bin Wang, Xiaochun Yang
